text: Developing a mobile app requires careful planning. First, think about *responsive design*—your app must look and work well on different screen sizes, from small phones to large tablets. You’ll also decide between *native vs cross-platform* approaches. Native apps are built specifically for iOS or Android, offering smooth *performance* and access to device features. Cross-platform tools like React Native let you use one codebase for both systems, which can save time but may affect performance slightly. Finally, you’ll submit your app to *app stores* like Google Play or Apple’s App Store, where it goes through review before being available to users.
